heading: Default
label: 2053 Default
notes: Amendments2001— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 107–95section 3774 of this title
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1998 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1998section 602(f) of Pub. L. 105–368section 2106 of this title
amendments: Amendments2001— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 107–95section 3774 of this title
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1998 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1998section 602(f) of Pub. L. 105–368section 2106 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary shall take such steps as may be necessary to obtain repayment on any loan that is in default and that is guaranteed under this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: the total outstanding obligation on the loan, including principal, interest, and expenses authorized by the loan documents, through the date of the public sale (as authorized under such documents and State law); and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount realized at such sale.
